name: Pika Insights
description: Pika Insights exists because 90% of sales in Africa are recorded with pen and paper, making the data inaccessible to corporates. This is the informal trade, a $1 trillion dollar market that is expected to double in two years. But the small shops that make up this sector, cannot present data to vouch for their businesses. We offer them a bookkeeping app that improves their data, reduces risk for lenders, and generates data we sell to multiple industries for marketing and sales intelligence.
program: Techstars New York City powered by J.P. Morgan

extra.brief_description: Pika Insights exists because 90% of sales in Africa are recorded with pen and paper, making the data inaccessible to corporates. name: LyfPlus
description:
LyfPlus provides a software infrastructure for health facilities to set up custom digital health products that suit their patient needs. The module-based architecture allows products like telehealth, EHRs and e-pharmacies to be developed, deployed and scaled independently.

Health facilities can;

1. Quickly set up and launch solutions across the patient value chain at $0 initial cost.
2. Use data insights to predict patient dynamics and enhance the quality of their services.
3.
location: Dar es Salaam, Dar es Salaam Region, Tanzania
program: Techstars Washington DC powered by J.P. Morgan
